instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 2.5D flying game 'Paper Fly' using React Native (Expo) and canvas-style rendering or SVGs. Follow the high-contrast Neo-brutalist UI style for menus paired with a dreamy, soft pastel game world. Prioritize responsive tilt controls using Expo sensors (gyroscope) and smooth spring animations for UI.

layouts_and_grids.hud: absolute top-12 left-0 right-0 px-6 flex justify-between items-start z-50
layouts_and_grids.safe_area: Ensure padding matches device safe areas

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/30 border-white/50 border rounded-3xl for HUD elements and menu containers.
visual_enhancers.neo_brutalism: Use harsh 2px borders (border-slate-900) and hard shadows (shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#0f172a]) on interactive buttons.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Text elements over the game canvas must have drop-shadow for visibility.

components_and_styles.primary_button: bg-white text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#0f172a] rounded-2xl px-8 py-4 font-black uppercase text-xl active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-[0_0px_0_0_#0f172a]
components_and_styles.hud_pill: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/20 border border-white/40 rounded-full px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-900 font-bold
components_and_styles.slider: Track should be thick, thumb should be a white circle with a 2px slate border

game_visuals_and_sprites.paper_plane: Origami style, pure white with sharp slate outlines. Rendered top-down or slight isometric.
game_visuals_and_sprites.collectible_rings: Golden yellow torus, soft glow, bobbing animation.
game_visuals_and_sprites.obstacles: Abstract pastel blocks or storm clouds.
game_visuals_and_sprites.environment: Parallax scrolling pastel clouds in the background.

motion_and_interaction.ui_entrance: Spring physics for menu screens sliding in.
motion_and_interaction.plane_movement: Smooth interpolation based on gyroscope data. Plane tilts visibly based on orientation.
motion_and_interaction.boost_effect: Speed lines around edges, slight FOV increase on tap-and-hold.
motion_and_interaction.ring_collection: Ring scales up rapidly and fades out.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over glass panels has sufficient contrast. Use drop-shadows on HUD text.
accessibility.motion: Provide an option to reduce screen shake in settings.

image_urls.description: Dreamy pastel sunset sky to be used as a reference or direct asset for the scrolling parallax background.
Secondary reference for cloud coloring and atmospheric depth.
